primary_error.message: this invariant could not be proved to be maintained by the loop
primary_error.context: invariant forall i :: 0 <= i < index ==> (IsOdd(arr[i]) ==> i in oddNumbers)

repair_strategy.problem_summary: Incorrect specification using array index instead of array element value, and redundant null check.

problem_details.what: The ensures clause and loop invariant incorrectly checked 'i in oddNumbers' (treating index as value) instead of 'arr[i] in oddNumbers'. Additionally, the code included an unnecessary 'arr != null' precondition.
problem_details.why: In Dafny, arrays are non-null by default, making the null check redundant. The specification confused array indices with array element values - it should check whether the element value 'arr[i]' exists in the result sequence, not whether the index 'i' exists in it.
problem_details.how: Remove the redundant 'requires arr != null' precondition. Change 'i in oddNumbers' to 'arr[i] in oddNumbers' in both the ensures clause and the loop invariant to correctly express that odd element values (not their indices) should appear in the result sequence.
